description: Beautifully remodeled 3 bed/2.5 bath home in the heart of Elm Grove subdivision! This 2 story home has been completely updated in 2026 from top to bottom! NEW floors, paint (outdoor and indoor), kitchen, primary bath, secondary bath, HVAC, roof (2025), lighting fixtures, fans, door/ drawer hardware, driveway, back patio, landscaping and MORE! Flexible floorplan with primary bedroom down, 2 bedrooms and a gameroom upstairs, and a flex room that can be used for study or sunroom. Home is located down the street from a large community park and playground, and is only minutes from Hwy 59 via Northpark Drive. This is a CAN NOT MISS OPPORTUNITY for anyone looking for an amazing turnkey home that is move-in ready for you to enjoy!

This charming property boasts a spacious open floor plan with abundant natural light. The modern kitchen features stainless steel appliances and granite countertops. Relax in the luxurious master suite with a large walk-in closet and private balcony. Enjoy outdoor gatherings in the nice size backyard with a deck. Located in a desirable neighborhood with top-rated schools and easy access to parks and shopping. Recent improvenets include new roof (2026), new HVAC (2025), hot water heater (2025), dishwasher (2025), cooktop (2026), interior walls and ceilings painted 2026. Don't miss the opportunity to make this your dream home!

Brand new, energy-efficient home available by Apr 2026! Skip your commute and work from home by purposing the Weston’s versatile flex space into a home office. When it’s time to take a break, head upstairs for some fun in the spacious game room. The primary suite features a luxurious five-piece bath. This master-planned community is a rare find in Spring Branch. The Townhome Series features a simple buying process with clear pricing and no surprises. With ready move-in homes made up of five two-story floorplans ranging from 1,495 – 2,052 sq. ft., you’re sure to find something you’ll love.  Each of our homes is built with innovative, energy-efficient features designed to help you enjoy more savings, better health, real comfort and peace of mind.

This beautifully designed New Construction two-story home offers 2,035 sq. ft. of thoughtfully planned living space, featuring first-floor living and a spacious game room or versatile flex area upstairs. The primary suite impresses with two generous walk-in closets and a vaulted ceiling that enhances the open, airy ambiance. Throughout the home, high ceilings and abundant natural light create a bright, welcoming atmosphere. The kitchen stands out with expanded countertop space rarely found in comparable homes and a true farmhouse sink, blending style and functionality perfectly. This is the floor plan you will love! Please schedule your private tour today!

Beautiful villa in a gated community right off Westcott and Blossom; which leads directly to the Eastern Glades at Memorial Park and Blossom Street being the Bike Trail, connecting to the Buffalo Bayou Parks. This little gem was just recently updated in 2026. The home features spacious, open-flow living spaces. Kitchen has granite counters and peninsula island and stainless appliances including new refrigerator. Living and dining room are complemented by a gas fireplace, dry bar and hardwood flooring. The 3rd bedroom is on the same level as the living areas. Primary Bedroom has double French doors providing unique overview of the living area and the ensuite bath offers double vanities, two walk-in closets. A spacious first-floor en-suite bedroom features double doors leading to a private, fenced backyard.

Lock & leave luxury in this beautifully designed, gated community home! The open-concept first floor is perfect for entertaining, featuring an oversized family room with a wall of windows, stylish finishes, and a chef-worthy kitchen with stainless steel appliances, convection oven, pendant lighting, and an oversized island. Upstairs, all 3 bedrooms offer privacy, including a spacious primary suite with abundant natural light, double vanity, designer tub, and oversized frameless glass shower. Two secondary bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry room complete the second floor. Enjoy evenings in the backyard—your perfect retreat at the end of the day! Centrally located minutes from major freeways, shopping, dining, and more, this home is a must-see.

This Clear Lake beauty checks ALL the boxes and then some. 5 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, an open layout, and a massive kitchen island that's begging for snacks, wine nights, and game days. You've got quartz counters, stainless appliances, updated fixtures + lighting , and a gas/wood-burning fireplace for cozy vibes. Both full baths bring the wow factor with walk-in showers and double sinks, plus there is a handy half bath tucked right off the laundry room- perfect for guests. Step out back to a huge deck made for entertaining and hot tubing, a separate garage, long driveway and tons of parking. And the cherry on top? Quick access to I-45, Baybrook Mall, tons of shopping + dining AND low taxes!

description: Beautifully maintained New Orleans style patio home in Sunset Heights close to lots of restaurants and shopping. As you approach the home, you'll notice the classic double-gallery architecture with a gated front yard and inviting front porch. Open living features hardwood floors, built-ins, and seamless flow into a center-island kitchen with marble counters, stainless appliances, and custom cabinetry. Spacious primary suite offers dual vanities and modern finishes, while two secondary bedrooms provide flexibility for guests or office use. Outdoor space includes a brick paver patio, second floor balcony and alley-access with detached 2-car garage. Close to Heights dining, trails, Airline Farmers Market and Whole Foods.

Charming Craftsman in the heart of Fort Worth’s coveted Cultural District—an area buyers actively seek for its character, walkability, and proximity to everything that makes Fort Worth special. Located just steps away from the renowned Bowie House Hotel (featured in Landman), world-class art museums, top medical facilities, and only a few miles west of downtown, this home offers both lifestyle and location. Featuring 3 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms, the home showcases ORIGINAL HARDWOODS throughout, abundant natural light, and timeless architectural details. The formal dining room features a coffered ceiling with direct access to a 14x6 side patio, perfect for entertaining. The kitchen blends original charm cabinetry—freshly painted—with new tile flooring and quartz countertops. Additional upgrades include fresh interior and exterior paint, a newly added gable enhancing neighborhood cohesion, updated plumbing, and a newer tankless water heater. An added benefit is the option for two owner’s suites, with the seller completing a full ensuite bath in the rear bedroom featuring a walk-in shower, marble tile, and granite vanity. Outside, enjoy new sod surrounding the half-moon parking area and additional gravel parking behind the wood fence, with space to build a garage similar to neighboring homes. A 16x10 permitted shed with AC, electricity, plumbing cleanout, and RV outlet offers endless potential for a man cave or future ADU. The floored attic is ideal for storage or a future conversion. With a 2019 5-ton HVAC system, this home delivers both charm and function in one of Fort Worth’s most sought-after neighborhoods.

Stunning 4-bed, 3-bath home featuring an open floor plan and two primary suites in Inwood Forest. The 2 primary suites can be used as a private guest suite or as a multi-generational living layout w/ separate access. Updated luxury vinyl flooring throughout, plantation shutters, fresh paint, and upgraded hardware. The kitchen is equipped w/ a double oven and an SS workstation w/ a double-basin sink and an integrated drying rack for the ultimate chef! The home offers built-in shelves and a wood-burning fireplace in the family room. Major systems: an updated AC (2021) w/ a 10-year parts warranty and an energy-efficient water heater (2018). The exterior features mature trees, a covered patio, and outdoor green space overlooking future parks and trails from the Inwood Forest Regional Detention Project (Q3 2026 completion). A gated U-shaped driveway provides covered parking for up to 6 vehicles. Easy access to Hwy 290, Loop 610, and I-45. You do not want to miss this move-in-ready home!

*Seller is willing to assist with closing costs or a rate buy-down through preferred lender with an acceptable offer. Step into The Grace floor plan in Redbird Ranch in San Antonio, TX. Inside this 4 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom home, you will find 1952 square feet of living space designed to meet your needs. The arched front patio opens to a grand foyer which then leads to a spacious living room. The living room blends seamlessly into the kitchen and dining area in an open concept floorplan. Your kitchen is built for the ultimate home chef and offers quartz counter tops, stainless steel appliances, and a kitchen island overlooking the living room. Don't forget a deep, single basin kitchen sink for convenience and ease. The staircase leads to the upstairs main bedroom suite, all secondary bedrooms, and your utility room. The Grace floor plan is ideal if you want to keep your entertaining space and private space separate. The upstairs main bedroom has an attached bathroom that includes a tiled walk-in shower, separate water closet and plenty of storage space with built-in shelving and a grand walk-in closet. Additional features of this home include sheet vinyl flooring in the entry, living room, and all wet areas, quartz countertops in all bathrooms and our HOME IS CONNECTED base package. Using one central hub that talks to all the devices in your home, you can control the lights, thermostat and locks, all from your cellular device.

As you pull into the quiet cul-de-sac, this home immediately stands out, not just for its location, but for how well it’s been updated inside and out.

Step through the front door and you’ll notice the difference right away. The layout actually makes sense. Multiple living areas give you flexibility, whether that’s hosting, working from home, or just having space to spread out without feeling disconnected. The main level flows naturally, with an updated kitchen at the center that ties everything together.

Upstairs, you’ve got additional living space that works perfectly as a game room, media area, or second retreat. Downstairs, the fourth bedroom offers a great option for guests or a private office setup.

But the real highlight is out back.

The backyard has been transformed into a space you’ll actually use. The pool gives you that resort-style feel without leaving home, and there’s still room to relax, entertain, or keep things low-key depending on the day.

Tucked into an established neighborhood in North Lewisville, you’re in a spot that’s hard to beat. Quiet streets, close to parks, and easy access to everything you need without the constant traffic and noise.

This isn’t just an updated house. It’s a home that’s been brought forward to match how people actually live today.

Calling all Investors, Landlords, Flippers, and those looking for a Bargain Basement home for the Family! You've found the Deal Of The Year! Fifty percent of the After Repaired Value! This Rare Mountain Creek Meadows Estate, built in 1989, has been unoccupied since the previous owner left in 2019 to care for her ill family member. During the 2021 freeze, the water pipes burst, flooding the home. The foundation looks solid, just some settlement for the yard not being watered. The previous owner states that the roof was replaced in 2015. This property has great drive-up appeal, lots of windows that create a warm, wonderful feeling, a two-way fireplace for the den and master bedroom, and, if a wall is removed, it would create a great open floor plan! This home backs up to a Nature Preserve, and installing a wrought-iron fence and an upstairs balcony would add significant charm and value to this estate! The After Repaired Value is $390,000-$395,000, depending on the buyer's quality of work. The estimated cost of Rehab is $70,000- $75,000, depending on who performs the work. The rental income in this area ranges from $38,000 to $42,000 a year. This home is available just in time for the Spring Selling Season! Send your buyer by to see this one before it gets away! Located just minutes to Downtown Dallas, Downtown Fort Worth, Bishop Arts, The Cowboys and Texas Rangers Stadium, the Arlington Entertainment District! We are now in multiple offers! The offer deadline date is Thursday, April 9th, at 7 PM. No Blind Offers will be accepted!

Ask about 0% Down with *NO* PMI on a low 30-year fixed rate loan available on this home! This is your opportunity to own a beautifully reimagined home, thoughtfully taken down to the studs in 2019 and rebuilt with permits. The expanded layout offers a seamless blend of comfort and functionality, featuring a spacious primary suite and a versatile office or MIL suite to accommodate a variety of living needs.  Extensive improvements—totaling over $300,000 when renovated (per the previous owner) —bring both quality and intention to every space. The kitchen has been redesigned with custom cabinetry and clean, elevated finishes, opening naturally to the main living areas for an easy, connected flow. Updated windows invite in abundant natural light, while major system upgrades, including a high-quality HVAC system and tankless water heater, provide long-term efficiency and peace of mind. Exterior enhancements, including updated roofing, siding, fencing, and a striking mahogany front door, create a refined and cohesive presence from the street.  Ideally positioned in one of Austin’s most convenient corridors, the home offers quick access to top dining, nightlife, and major highways, along with close proximity to the Domain and the rapidly growing employment centers along 183. A rare combination of thoughtful design, permitted craftsmanship, and exceptional location.

Beautiful home on a large corner lot in the Highlands at Mayfield Ranch! Built in 2017, this fantastic floorplan offers a spacious downstairs primary suite with a bay window overlooking the back deck, an open family/breakfast/kitchen layout, and a formal dining room off the entry that also works perfectly as a home office. Upstairs features a second living area and generously sized secondary bedrooms. Upgrades include granite countertops in the kitchen and baths, wood-look tile throughout the downstairs living areas, new carpet, and an energy-efficient tankless water heater. The backyard is built for entertaining with a covered patio, gas line for grilling, and an extended appx. 350 sq ft composite deck overlooking the large yard. Ideally located just a short distance from the neighborhood park and pool and Hwy 1431, giving you quick access to major roads I-35, Parmer, and 183. Minutes to the nearly 800-acre Southwest Williamson County Regional Park, restaurants, shopping, hospitals, IKEA, Round Rock Outlets and so much more!

Stunningly reimagined in 2022, this Junius Heights Historic District gem at 5727 Victor St combines classic charm with modern luxury. Rich in local history, the home was once owned by John Funderburk, the beloved mascot and Junius Heights trolley conductor during the land rush of 1906—adding a unique and storied past to its appeal. Taken to the studs, the home boasts all-new plumbing, electrical, and sewer systems, plus thoughtful foundation work—ready for its next owner.

The reimagined floorplan now includes a stylish powder bath and an abundance of natural light throughout. The gourmet kitchen features top-of-the-line THOR appliances, perfect for entertaining, while the fabulous screened-in porch off the primary bedroom offers serene views of the large backyard—ample room for a pool or outdoor oasis. Brand-new sod graces both front and back yards, enhancing curb appeal and outdoor enjoyment.
